pi_items.source: Task description specifies survey title 'PHQ-9 Mental Health Screening Study 2024'
Task description explicitly requires three question groups: Symptom Frequency, Functional Impact, and Demographics

pi_items.verified_value: F (one of multiple valid types: F/H/1/A/B/C/E)
pi_items.source: LimeSurvey manual confirms type 'F' = Array (flexible row). Export script and verifier accept multiple array types including F.
PHQ-9 instrument definition contains exactly 9 depression screening items. Task description states 'nine PHQ-9 items as a single Array question'
Task description explicitly requires: 'The survey must be configured to anonymize all responses (IRB requirement for participant confidentiality)'
Task description explicitly requires: 'When construction is complete, activate the survey so it is ready to collect data.'

pi_items.metadata_value: Social Science Research Assistants / Clinical Psychology Researchers
pi_items.verified_value: Social Science Research Assistants (SOC 19-4061) / Survey Researchers (SOC 19-3022) / Psychology Teachers, Postsecondary (SOC 25-1066)
pi_items.source: README.md 'Occupation Context' section lists three occupations from master_dataset.csv. Metadata claims 'Clinical Psychology Researchers' which does not appear in the README or master_dataset. The README lists 'Survey Researchers' and 'Psychology Teachers, Postsecondary' instead.

pi_items.metadata_value: PHQ-9 Patient Health Questionnaire (Kroenke, Spitzer & Williams, 2001, public domain)
pi_items.verified_value: PHQ-9 Patient Health Questionnaire (Kroenke, Spitzer & Williams, 2001, public domain)
pi_items.source: Verified via PubMed/NIH sources confirming: (1) Authors: Kroenke, Spitzer, Williams; (2) Year: 2001 publication in J Gen Intern Med; (3) Public domain: Pfizer released copyright and made publicly available without restriction. README confirms 'Pfizer Inc., no copyright'

privileged_info_summary: The PHQ-9 is a validated, public domain depression screening instrument published by Kroenke, Spitzer, and Williams in 2001. The survey requires 9 items arranged in an array-type question across 3 question groups, with response anonymization and activation mandatory. The task involves building this instrument in LimeSurvey using legitimate, non-sensitive clinical research methodology. One metadata claim is inaccurate: the occupation context lists 'Clinical Psychology Researchers' but the task README specifies Social Science Research Assistants, Survey Researchers, and Psychology Teachers, Postsecondary from the master dataset.
